title: clerodendrum magnificum
intro: Clerodendrum magnificum, also known as the 'Tangerine Storm' or 'Candy Cane Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum magnificum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
